name: 43 Hoover Criminals Gang
description: Criminals Gang Also Known As: 4-Tray Hoover Criminals Gang; formerly 43 Hoover Crips Founded: 1970s Origin: South Los Angeles, California Primary Territory: 43rd Street & Hoover Street Ethnicity: African-American Affiliation: Hoover Criminals Gang Former Affiliation: Crips (Hoover Crips) Status: Inactive / Dormant The 43 Hoover Criminals Gang, also known as the 4-Tray Hoover Criminals Gang, is an African-American street gang located on the West Side of South Los Angeles, California.
